# Kyrgyzstan Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Kyrgyzstan's administrative hierarchy:
> 9 regions, 53 districts, 460 settlements.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total regions: 9
- Total districts: 53
- Total settlements: 460
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-05-27
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All regions (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-region.json)
- [All districts (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-district.json)
- [All settlements (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-settlement.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Region

- [Batken](https://github.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/batken-kg05/) — 6 districts, 34 settlements
- [Bishkek (city)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bishkek-city-kg11/) — 0 districts, 0 settlements
- [Chui](https://github.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/chui-kg08/) — 9 districts, 113 settlements
- [Issyk-Kul](https://github.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/issyk-kul-kg02/) — 7 districts, 63 settlements
- [Jalal-Abad](https://github.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/jalal-abad-kg03/) — 13 districts, 75 settlements
- [Naryn](https://github.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/naryn-kg04/) — 6 districts, 60 settlements
- [Osh](https://github.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/osh-kg06/) — 7 districts, 79 settlements
- [Osh (city)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/osh-city-kg21/) — 0 districts, 0 settlements
- [Talas](https://github.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/talas-kg07/) — 5 districts, 36 settlements

## Per-Region Full Data

- [Batken](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/batken-kg05.txt)
- [Bishkek (city)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/bishkek-city-kg11.txt)
- [Chui](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/chui-kg08.txt)
- [Issyk-Kul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/issyk-kul-kg02.txt)
- [Jalal-Abad](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/jalal-abad-kg03.txt)
- [Naryn](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/naryn-kg04.txt)
- [Osh](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/osh-kg06.txt)
- [Osh (city)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/osh-city-kg21.txt)
- [Talas](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/talas-kg07.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (region), 2 (district), 3 (settlement)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Kyrgyzstan Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/kyrgyzstan-administrative-divisions
